socialPosts.text: [Post] "PROJECT #2 — SOLO LEARNING 2 BUILD... I wanted my portfolio to answer: 'How do you think as an engineer?' Volume I has officially gone to press." — The Daily Deployment released.
[Tweet] "Portfolio Review Welcome. The Daily Deployment — Issue 001 is officially live. Open to feedback and suggestions." — @AnshitvaM
[Post] "Privacy is often treated as a feature, not a foundation. Norexo is built around a simple belief: Every voice deserves to be heard safely." — Norexo launches anonymous community dispatches.
[Post] "Building JVMHub for Java developers using JavaScript MERN stack. A platform for JVM engineers, powered by node/react." — JVMHub concepts released.
[Post] "bcrypt silently discards anything past 72 characters, no warning. Kavach-KDF resolves this limitation and defaults to Argon2id." — security dispatches.
[Tweet] "First-principles backend engineering means writing raw socket connections. No shortcuts. #BuildInPublic @AnshitvaM"
[Tweet] "80 repositories tracked. A serial builder can't leave default configurations alone."
[Tweet] "Mathura reports: Coffee index volatile (+12.4%), sleep index critical (-45.2%)."
[Tweet] "31 modules of raw backend. Zero libraries. Hostel Chronicles is live."
